name: Norwegian Birthday Cake (Blotkake)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat egg whites with cream of tartar until foamy.
2. Beat in sugar gradually until stiff peaks form.
3. Gradually add egg yolks to the egg white mixture.
4. Stir water and vanilla extract into the yolk mixture.
5. Sift flour and baking powder together twice.
6. Add the sifted flour mixture to the egg yolk mixture, stirring gently.
7. Fold in the egg white mixture until combined.
8. Divide batter evenly between two 8-inch round parchment-lined cake pans.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-40 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Allow cakes to cool completely.
11. Cut each cake into two layers.
12. Whip cream and save some to decorate the outside of the cake.
13. Mix crushed strawberries with juice and remaining whipped cream.
14. Spread the strawberry mixture over the cake layers.
Each serving contains about: 382 calories; 108 mg sodium; 172 mg cholesterol; 20 grams fat; 45 grams carbohydrates; 6 grams protein; 0.05 gram fiber.
